What It Is

A personal photo gallery website with a slideshow, responsive grid layout, and smooth navigation between themed collections.

Nature
Gallery

The homepage features a full-width slideshow of nature scenes — seascapes, skies, and sunsets — with navigation arrows and dot indicators.

Gallery
